articles.title: Warsh sidesteps questions over Trump’s influence on Fed rate policy
articles.body: Nominee to head US central bank grilled by senators over president’s public calls for cuts

articles.title: Warsh signals evolution, not revolution at the Fed
articles.body: The nominee for chair of the central bank wants regime change, but at a slow and deliberative pace

articles.title: VW to export more China-made EVs in global sales drive
articles.body: Strategy pivot coincides with slowdown and fierce competition in world’s largest automotive market

articles.body: Firm whose partners bill more than $2,000 per hour apologises to judge for software-driven errors in bankruptcy case

articles.title: How Warsh can give Trump rate cuts, keep Fed independent, and make the market happy
articles.body: The confirmation hearing for President Trump's nominee to be the next Fed chairman once again sparked heated debate.

articles.title: Trump surprised by stock market comeback amid Iran conflict, thought Dow would be down 20%
articles.body: President Donald Trump said Tuesday he was surprised by the resiliency of the stock market amid the Iran conflict.

articles.title: UPS and FedEx have begun filing for some tariff refunds
articles.body: UPS and FedEx have begun filing requests for some tariff refunds through the government's refund process, but those funds could take months to reach customers.

articles.title: UnitedHealth tops quarterly estimates, hikes profit outlook as insurer manages high medical costs
articles.body: The nation's largest private insurer expects 2026 adjusted earnings of more than $18.25 per share, up from a previous outlook of greater than $17.75 per share.
